project: PRJ03246 - Balance Point Control - BPC - Celle - GT3a - MFC_ MTT
comment: ABI run not required by client. Equipment packed for Demob to Celle with BPC truck/trailer, then will be Backloaded to Abz. Will leave tomorrow. LL flying back to Abz tomorrow.

project: PRJ02722 - Welltec - Welltec - Kazakhstan - 9886 - Leak_Detection_ SSD (ZeroTime / X-Y)
job: PRJ02722-3 Karachaganak 9886 SSD Position, Leak Detection (Primary Barrier)
comment: Once at suface it was discovered that the bottom shroud of the CTF and the CFSM was missing, left inside the well. The plan is for Welltec to arrange a 3 1/8 drift to push this to the bottom of the well.

project: PRJ03246 - Balance Point Control - BPC - Celle - GT3a - MFC_ MTT
comment: Both toolstrings checked with test cable. At end of shift spent ~30 minutes testing tools with BPC wireline (7000m) but unable to get Comms. BPC also have a 4000m cable on site. Last night received the Depth equipment from MD in Munich. Plan today - test depth equipment and hopefully test tools with 4000m cable offline if possible. BPB currently logging RSBT-MFC60 in 9-5/8" and 10-3/8" casing. Yesterday they logged the 18-3/8" casing and data looked good, just waiting for confirmation from the client if they are happy with it.
